title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 25 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 25 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 25 2026
summary:
Main
Dalian iron ore futures trended weaker throughout the day. The most-traded I2605 contract concluded the sessionat 806.5 RMB per tonne, a decrease of 1.83% from the previous trading day. In the physical market, spot prices fell by approximately 5-10 RMB.
